original_text: The design looks premium, but the battery is weak and support replies slowly.
The sleep score is interesting, but I do not understand why my oxygen dipped at night.
The device is comfortable enough for side sleeping, but the app keeps showing scary numbers without explanation.
My CPAP mask leaves marks, but I still need it for treatment. A tracker would only help me discuss trends with my doctor.
Fitbit helped me notice sleep changes, but I only saw three comments about it in this dataset.
